title: On the God of Socrates
description: Apuleius explains the Platonic doctrine of daemons — intermediary beings between gods and men, including Socrates' famous sign.
introduction: Apuleius explains the Platonic doctrine of daemons — intermediary beings between gods and men, including Socrates' famous sign.

translation.text: Between the visible gods and mortal humans there exist certain daemons — intermediary powers.
